title: Ched's Realism Mod
description: A realistic building mod for city designers. Choose from 1000+ models to decorate your house, city or town. Possibilities are endless, recreate real life in minecraft!
body:
**Important notice: If you are seeing black and purple squares then you need to be sure to have Puzzle mod and the required dependencies!**

**FORGE SUPPORT HAS NOT BEEN DROPPED!
We found a working generator for now.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/15hTb52gU5A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**A realistic minecraft building experience for city builders and interior designers! Aimed at an audience looking to build at a 1:1 or 1.5:1 building scale, Ched's Realism Mod is a middle of the road realism building mod that finds a balance between realistic graphics and performance. We are one of the only realism building mods that isn't actively trying to set your PC on fire!**

**Requires CTM Pack: [https://modrinth.com/project/cheds-realism-ctm](https://modrinth.com/project/cheds-realism-ctm)**

We currently have over 700 models but are limited in certain areas such as foliage, we hope to add more to where we're lacking in future updates. This mod is a CREATIVE mode only mod

**Current Sections For Decor**
- Walls/Windows/Doors
- Roofing
- Kitchen
- Outdoor Details
- Commercial/Business Decor
- Roads/Street Decor
- Foliage

**Check out this video to see everything new with Ched's Realism Mod:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TEltUIQLOn8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
